opening_hook: Open a real Enron branch with the mail thread, the dated public-company timeline, and the learned reference forecast already lined up.
demo_goal: Show that the Enron flagship is a real-history, multi-source what-if bundle on the shared canonical timeline.

primitives.name: Historical Branch
primitives.current_value: Sara Shackleton is moving a PG&E financial power deal while the counterparty's macro-credit picture is deteriorating.
primitives.what_it_means: One real dated branch point from the Enron archive.

primitives.name: Timeline
primitives.what_it_means: Mail plus dated public-company context on one shared chronology.

primitives.name: Forecast
primitives.what_it_means: Repo-owned learned reference result that ships with the bundle.

beats.title: Open the saved bundle
beats.operator_action: Start in Studio with the saved Enron workspace open.
beats.read_it_as: This is a repo-owned real-history branch, not a synthetic script.

beats.title: Show the mixed timeline
beats.operator_action: Filter the Company Timeline and point out mail plus public-context rows before the branch.
beats.read_it_as: The branch lives inside one shared chronology rather than beside detached side panels.

beats.title: Anchor the real decision
beats.operator_action: Read the branch point and why this thread matters.
beats.read_it_as: The choice is concrete and dated, and the saved bundle keeps the real lead-up in view.

beats.title: Show the candidate ranking
beats.operator_action: Open the ranked comparison and call out the current top candidate.
beats.read_it_as: The current saved winner is Hold for credit re-check.

beats.title: Show the learned forecast
beats.operator_action: Open the saved forecast panel and keep the reference backend visible.
beats.read_it_as: The shipped learned path is the default saved result for this bundle.

beats.title: Keep the macro claims narrow
beats.operator_action: Point at the public-company slice and note the current calibration caveat.
beats.read_it_as: The macro fields stay advisory context beside the real thread evidence.

beats.title: Close on the shared product surface
beats.operator_action: End on the bundle files and export preview.
beats.read_it_as: The same saved bundle now carries the branch, the chronology, the forecast, and the demo guide in one place.

closing_argument: Enron is the real-history flagship because the bundle now opens as one coherent branch scene with the chronology, the learned forecast, and the dated public context already attached.
